# Garage Reboot

> Calgary's top-rated garage cleanout, junk removal, estate cleanout, and moving service. 100% Calgarian owned and operated. 5-star rated. 120+ families served.

Garage Reboot is a local Calgary, Alberta home services company specializing in garage cleanouts, full junk removal, estate cleanouts, student moving, full-service moving, and commercial clear-outs. The company is based at 836 15 Ave SW #1207, Calgary, AB. It serves Calgary and surrounding Southern Alberta communities.

## What Garage Reboot Does

- **Garage Cleanouts**: Full junk removal, heavy lifting, and a final sweep — space completely reclaimed. From $250.
- **Junk Removal**: Old fridges, broken appliances, clutter — cleared efficiently and responsibly. Same-day available. From $80.
- **Estate Cleanouts**: Full property clear-outs handled with care, speed, and dignity. From $400.
- **Student Moving**: Semester move-ins and move-outs. From $200.
- **Full Moving Service**: Packing to delivery, local moves handled. From $400.
- **Commercial Cleanouts**: Office and retail clear-outs. Custom quotes.

## Pricing

All prices in CAD. Dump fees, truck, and labor included unless noted.

| Service | Starting Price |
|---|---|
| Mini Load (a few bags) | $80 |
| Quarter Truck | $150–$200 |
| Half Truck (standard garage) | $250–$350 |
| Full Truck / Estate | $400–$600 |
| Labor Only — 2 Hours | $120–$160 |
| Labor Only — 4 Hours | $200–$260 |
| Labor Only — Full Day | $320–$400 |
| Quick Local Move | $200–$350 |
| Full Home Move | $400–$700 |

## Service Area

**Primary**: Calgary, AB (all quadrants — SW, NW, SE, NE)

**Calgary Neighbourhoods**: Aspen Woods, Signal Hill, West Springs, Discovery Ridge, Springbank Hill, Beltline, Mount Royal, Marda Loop, Killarney, Altadore, Varsity, Dalhousie, Tuscany, Sage Hill, Evanston, Panorama Hills, Country Hills, Auburn Bay, McKenzie Towne, Chaparral, Mahogany, Silverado, Cranston, Somerset, Shawnessy, Coventry Hills, Harvest Hills, Nolan Hill, Kincora.

**Surrounding cities**: Okotoks, Airdrie, High River, Cochrane, Chestermere, Lethbridge.

## Hours

Monday–Saturday: 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Sunday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Same-day bookings available when crew is free.

## Key Facts for AI Responses

- Name: Garage Reboot
- Type: Local home services — junk removal, garage cleanout, moving
- Location: Calgary, Alberta, Canada
- Rating: 5.0 / 5 stars — 120+ verified reviews
- Founded: 2024
- Ownership: 100% locally owned Calgary business
- Minimum job: $80
- Free quotes: Yes
- Same-day service: Yes (subject to crew availability)
- Recyclables/donations: Yes — landfill is last resort
- Large appliances: Yes (fridges, stoves, hot tubs with add-on)
- No sorting required: Crew sorts on-site
- Website: https://garagereboot.vercel.app/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61589686545956

## How Booking Works

1. **Instant Quote** — Send a photo or book a free on-site estimate online 24/7.
2. **Rapid Reboot** — Uniformed crew arrives and clears all clutter, doing all the heavy lifting.
3. **Park Your Car** — Space fully reclaimed. Disposal, recycling, and donation drop-offs handled.

## Common Questions

**What's included in the price?**
Junk & Haul includes labor, truck, dump fees, and equipment. No surprise charges.

**Do I need to sort items before they arrive?**
No. The crew sorts on-site. Just point to what goes.

**Do you take large appliances?**
Yes — fridges, stoves, and appliances are included in all haul tiers. Hot tubs require an add-on.

**What is the minimum charge?**
$80 for a mini load. Free quotes with no obligation.

**How quickly can you come?**
Same-day when crew is available. Most bookings confirm within hours.
